theme: Space relays for the best multi-hop rate
title: Relay Throughput Spacing
strategies: baseline: one relay per pair at its own midpoint (reproduces the checker baseline)
greedy: split the relay budget evenly across all pairs, chain at minimum uniform hop distance
strong: max-min water-filling -- repeatedly hand the next relay to whichever pair currently realizes the global minimum throughput, and stop spending once no addition can lift that minimum
adaptive variants: bias allocation toward long/hard pairs while capping density on short/clustered pairs to limit co-hop interference
